Operation 'listChannelMembers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. data.current_description: List channel members
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all members in a channel
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all members in a specified channel. Requires the channel ID as input. Returns a list of user objects containing member information. Useful for understanding channel composition and member details.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and overly simplistic. Added clarity about required inputs (channel ID), expected output format (list of user objects), and use case context. Improved actionability for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getUserInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary uses informal abbreviation 'info'. Description lacks specificity about required inputs (user ID) and output structure (User object with specific fields). Enhanced version clarifies input requirements and return value structure for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get profile information for a specific user.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed profile information for a user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed profile information for a specific user by user ID. Returns a User object containing profile data such as name, email, status, and other user attributes. Requires the target user ID as input.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses informal abbreviation 'info'. Description lacks specificity about required inputs (user ID) and output structure (User object with specific fields). Enhanced version clarifies input requirements and return value structure for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getUserPublicProfile' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description lack specificity about what distinguishes public profile from regular profile. Added context about input requirements (user ID), output scope (public fields only), and use case differentiation. Clarifies for AI agents when to use this versus getUserInfo operation.

data.current_description: Get the public profile of a user.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve publicly visible user profile information
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the publicly visible profile information for a specified user by user ID. Returns a User object containing only public profile fields (excludes private/sensitive information). Useful for displaying user information in shared contexts without exposing private data.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about what distinguishes public profile from regular profile. Added context about input requirements (user ID), output scope (public fields only), and use case differentiation. Clarifies for AI agents when to use this versus getUserInfo operation.

message: Operation 'sendMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on required inputs (recipient specification), output details (what is returned), and side effects (immediate delivery). Enhanced version specifies authentication requirements, input parameters, return value structure, and delivery behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Send a message to a channel or direct message conversation. Supports text, FlockML, and attachments.
data.summary_suggestion: Send message to channel or direct conversation
data.description_suggestion: Send a message to a channel or direct message conversation. Supports text content, FlockML formatting, and file attachments. Requires authentication and valid recipient (channel ID or user ID). Returns the sent message object with timestamp and message ID. Message is immediately delivered and visible to all conversation participants.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on required inputs (recipient specification), output details (what is returned), and side effects (immediate delivery). Enhanced version specifies authentication requirements, input parameters, return value structure, and delivery behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'fetchMessages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify input parameters (filtering, pagination options), authentication requirements, and detailed output structure (message array format, field contents, ordering) for AI agents to understand query capabilities and response format.

data.current_description: Retrieve messages from a channel or direct message conversation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve messages from a channel or direct message conversation. Supports filtering by date range, message count limits, and pagination. Requires authentication and valid conversation identifier (channel ID or user ID). Returns an array of message objects with content, sender information, timestamps, and attachments. Messages are returned in chronological order.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify input parameters (filtering, pagination options), authentication requirements, and detailed output structure (message array format, field contents, ordering) for AI agents to understand query capabilities and response format.

message: Operation 'listChannels' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is too generic. Description lacks output details about what channel information is returned. Enhanced version specifies the channel object structure, membership filtering behavior, and use case context to help AI agents understand the response format and operation purpose.

data.current_description: Get a list of all channels the authenticated user is a member of.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of all channels the authenticated user is a member of. Returns channel objects containing channel ID, name, description, member count, and creation metadata. Only channels where the user has membership are included. Useful for discovering available conversations and channel information.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks output details about what channel information is returned. Enhanced version specifies the channel object structure, membership filtering behavior, and use case context to help AI agents understand the response format and operation purpose.

data.current_description: Get detailed information about a specific channel.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information about a specific channel. Requires channel ID as input. Returns comprehensive channel object including ID, name, description, member list, creation date, channel settings, and access permissions. Requires authentication and user must have access to the channel.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague ('info' is non-specific). Description lacks input requirements (channel ID parameter) and output details (what fields are returned). message: Operation 'createChannel' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify required inputs (channel name), optional parameters (description, privacy, members), authentication requirements, return value (channel object with ID), and side effects (user becomes owner, channel immediately available).

data.current_description: Create a new channel in the team.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new channel in the team. Requires channel name and optional description, privacy settings, and initial members. Requires authentication. Returns the newly created channel object with assigned channel ID, creation timestamp, and default settings. The authenticated user becomes the channel owner. Channel is immediately available for messaging.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify required inputs (channel name), optional parameters (description, privacy, members), authentication requirements, return value (channel object with ID), and side effects (user becomes owner, channel immediately available).

data.current_description: Add one or more members to a channel.
data.description_suggestion: Add one or more members to a channel. Requires channel ID and list of user IDs to add. Requires authentication and user must have channel management permissions. Returns confirmation with list of successfully added members and any failures. Added members gain immediate access to channel messages and can participate in conversations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear.
